title: Adult In Home Respite Care - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Adult In Home Respite Care 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NORTH END SENIOR SOLUTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides older adults and adults with disabilities with adult day services, respite care for in-home caregivers, in-home support, transportation, support groups, and resource navigation, all aimed at assisting with their personal goals. 105 Pearl Street Gleneden Beach, OR 97368 Eligibility: Age 55 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Varies by program Email (541) 921-0937 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RISE, INC IN-HOME AND COMMUNITY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-home services that support people with intellectual and developmental disabilities (I/DD). Services include: behavior support, hourly caregiving, and case coordination. 4263 Commercial Street SE Suite 100 Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Children and adults with I/DD, mental health diagnoses, and backgrounds of abuse and neglect, and their families. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 371-3001 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTH END SENIOR SOLUTIONS NORTH END SENIOR SOLUTIONS RISE, INC IN-HOME AND COMMUNITY SERVICES
